summary: Made two surgical seam edits: Damian's annex probe now more clearly carries forward the school-memory thread from the previous chapter, and the closing line now exits on the WISE-mole pressure rather than the coat beat alone.
edits: Tightened Damian's interior reaction at the annex probe to echo the school-memory pursuit seeded in Chapter 7.
Adjusted the final sentence so the chapter closes with the mole phrase still pressing on Anya, supporting the handoff into the next chapter's paranoia and surveillance.
